title: calamintha patavina var. elatior
intro: Calamintha patavina var. elatior, commonly known as the tall calamintha, is a variety of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, digestive issues, and relieving muscle tension. The health benefits of Calamintha patavina var. elatior include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
